CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL( P45_Suppression_Reason__c , "Not Suppressed"), 0, IF(ISPICKVAL( P45_Suppression_Reason__c , "Long Term Sick"), 1, IF(ISPICKVAL( P45_Suppression_Reason__c , "Extended Maternity Leave"), 2 , IF(ISPICKVAL( P45_Suppression_Reason__c , "Employee Grievance"), 3 , IF(ISPICKVAL( P45_Suppression_Reason__c , "Tribunal"), 4 , IF(ISPICKVAL( P45_Suppression_Reason__c , "Death"), 5 , IF(ISPICKVAL( P45_Suppression_Reason__c , "Pregnancy related absence due to sickness"), 6 , IF(ISPICKVAL( P45_Suppression_Reason__c , "Public Duties"), 7 , IF(ISPICKVAL( P45_Suppression_Reason__c , "Industrial Action"), 8 , IF(ISPICKVAL( P45_Suppression_Reason__c , "Contractually Agreed"), 9 , IF(ISPICKVAL( P45_Suppression_Reason__c , "Other"), 10 ,0 )))))))))))
CustomField.label: Suppression Code
